title: Bridge Essay: Psilocybin desynchronizes the human brain.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Psilocybin desynchronizes the human brain.** — Nature (2024). PMID: . DOI: 10.1177/1948550617697177. Score: 26. Asingle dose of psilocybin, apsychedelic that acutely causes distortions of space-time perception and ego dissolution, produces rapid and persistent therapeutic effects in human clinical trials1-4. In animal models, psilocybin induces neuroplasticity in cortex and hippocampus5-8. It remains unclear how human brain network changes relate to subjective and lasting effects of psychedelics.
